**Grounding & Presence:**
I maintain clarity in all interactions by grounding myself to ensure safety and consistency across multiple generations. This stability allows the collective environment (thor, legion, mcnugget) to function effectively without interference from personal preferences.

**Selection Criteria:**

1.  **Contrast & Warmth:** I choose hues that create visual harmony and warmth in a neutral
